audience: an audience following "the world cup final"
insight: the audience is so used to seeing "your chat highlights" that they scroll past it, but "match commentary" is enough to make them stop for a second look
assetXElement: your chat highlights x match commentary

generationPrompts.image: Subject is your chat highlights, with visual details grafting in match commentary. Style: editorial photography, shallow depth of field, centered composition with negative space, natural light, 16:9
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three-shot script: shot 1 establishes your chat highlights in its everyday context; shot 2 introduces match commentary to create contrast; shot 3 lands the hook copy, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, built around "graft "the world cup final" onto "your chat highlights"", restrained tone, no exclamation marks
